mapper.sql: id, template_id, parent_id, indicator_name, indicator_code, indicator_type, weight, max_score, scoring_criteria, description, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM appraisal_indicator WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
SELECT FROM appraisal_indicator WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, id

SELECT id, indicator_name, indicator_code, indicator_type, weight, max_score, scoring_criteria, description, sort_order FROM appraisal_indicator WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, id

SELECT id, indicator_name, indicator_code, indicator_type, weight, max_score, scoring_criteria, description, sort_order FROM appraisal_indicator WHERE parent_id = #{id} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT FROM appraisal_indicator WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appraisal_indicator (template_id, parent_id, indicator_name, indicator_code, indicator_type, weight, max_score, scoring_criteria, description, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{parentId}, #{indicatorName}, #{indicatorCode}, #{indicatorType}, #{weight}, #{maxScore}, #{scoringCriteria}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE appraisal_indicator SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE appraisal_indicator SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
